approved_by: human approval of E8 execution plan for the Communication layer

input_snapshot.algorithm: sha256 over sorted per-file sha256 digests (excluding .DS_Store)

execution_metadata.note: Tool versions are an execution snapshot, not normative governance.

modified_files: apps/mobile/app/(customer)/_layout.tsx — registered messages routes.
apps/mobile/app/(shared)/_layout.tsx — registered notifications route.
apps/mobile/app/(technician)/_layout.tsx — registered messages routes.
apps/mobile/src/features/marketplace/screens/HomeScreen.tsx — added Messages and Notifications quick actions.
apps/mobile/src/features/technician/screens/TechnicianHomeScreen.tsx — added Messages and Notifications quick actions.
apps/mobile/src/lib/i18n.ts — registered communication namespace.
apps/mobile/src/locales/es-MX/marketplace.json — added messages and notifications keys.
packages/domain/src/aggregates/Conversation.ts — added lastReadAt, unreadCountFor, markReadAsOf, and public getters.
packages/domain/src/aggregates/Notification.ts — added public getters.
packages/domain/src/repositories/index.ts — exported conversation and notification repositories.
packages/domain/src/use-cases/index.ts — exported new communication use cases.
packages/types/src/dto/index.ts — added MessageDto, ConversationDto, and NotificationDto.
packages/ui/package.json — added @taskpro/types dependency so UI components can consume DTO contracts.
packages/ui/src/__tests__/components/scaffolded-components.test.tsx — updated ChatBubble test to use real props.
packages/ui/src/components/communication/ChatBubble.stories.tsx — stories for incoming/outgoing/system bubbles.
packages/ui/src/components/communication/ChatBubble.tsx — real implementation using MessageDto.
packages/ui/src/components/communication/ConversationHeader.stories.tsx — story with title, subtitle, avatar.
packages/ui/src/components/communication/ConversationHeader.tsx — real header with Avatar and Typography.
packages/ui/src/components/communication/MessageComposer.stories.tsx — stateful story with value/onSend.
packages/ui/src/components/communication/MessageComposer.tsx — real composer with TextInput and Button.

mutations.note: node_modules/ and .turbo/ directories are install/build artifacts and are not listed as authored mutations.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Conversation aggregate stores lastReadAt per participant; unreadCountFor derives from message sentAt.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Keeps unread state inside the aggregate while avoiding per-message read flags in E8.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: FakeConversationService and FakeNotificationService seed one demo conversation/notification when a user has none.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Provides visible data during development without requiring a backend seed expedition.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: (shared)/notifications.tsx accessible from both customer and technician home screens.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Notifications are cross-role; avoids duplicating the screen under each role layout.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: FakeNotificationService.notify logs the intended push to the console and creates an in-app notification record.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: E8 establishes the service contract; native Expo/FCM/APNs integration belongs to a later expedition.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: MessageComposer supports text only; MessageType enum supports photo/video/file/location for future expansion.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Attachments require application-level file picker and upload infrastructure not yet available.

deviations_from_plan.deviation: Added @taskpro/types as a runtime dependency of packages/ui.
deviations_from_plan.justification: ChatBubble consumes MessageDto; the DTO contract must be available to the UI package.

deviations_from_plan.deviation: Implemented ChatBubble, MessageComposer, and ConversationHeader fully rather than leaving them as placeholders.
deviations_from_plan.justification: E8 is the communication layer; the existing E3 placeholders became the executable visual contract for this expedition.

exclusions: No real-time messaging backend (WebSocket, Supabase Realtime).
No attachment upload or file picker.
No migrations or Supabase schema changes beyond E4.
No changes to knowledge/ authored artifacts.
No changes to .synth/ governance primitives beyond this replay record and governance-0019.
No git commits, branches, or pushes performed.
